## Release and privacy checklist

- [ ] No prompt, response, credential, or personal data is included.
- [ ] New or changed dependencies and bundled assets have been license-reviewed.
- [ ] Network communication remains opt-in and is documented in the privacy policy.
- [ ] Package, installer, workflow, and version changes received release-focused review.
